prompt: Ultra-realistic lifestyle portrait of a beautiful Polish woman in her mid-20s with distinct Eastern European features — high cheekbones, fair skin with subtle freckling, ash-blonde shoulder-length hair loosely tied, soft jawline. She sits upright but relaxed on a light oak café chair. Her head is tilted slightly downward, eyes fully closed, lips parted in a serene, blissful smile. She wears oversized off-white/cream over-ear headphones (identical in shape, scale, and matte finish to those in Image 1 and Image 2), perfectly fitted — ear cups fully enveloping ears, headband resting snugly across the crown, visible texture of premium protein leather ear pads. Warm, directional natural light enters from a large nearby window, casting soft volumetric highlights. Skin rendered in extreme macro fidelity: visible pores on nose and temples, faint capillary blush on cheeks. Background: soft bokeh of a contemporary Warsaw café — blurred hints of potted monstera leaves, honey-toned wooden tabletops. Shot on Canon EOS R5, 85mm f/1.4 lens, 8K resolution, cinematic color grade.
